message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F7F7F7
  BorderColor #666666
  RoundCorner 6
}

class "StokesCoupledSteady1" as StokesCoupledSteady1 <<C>>
class "StokesCoupledSteadySlip1" as StokesCoupledSteadySlip1 <<C>>
class "NSCoupledSteady1" as NSCoupledSteady1 <<C>>
class "NSCoupledSteadyNewton1" as NSCoupledSteadyNewton1 <<C>>

class "NSCoupledSteadySlip1" as NSCoupledSteadySlip1 <<C>>
class "NSCoupledSteadyNewtonSlip1" as NSCoupledSteadyNewtonSlip1 <<C>>
class "NSCoupledTransient1" as NSCoupledTransient1 <<C>>
class "NSCoupledTransientNewton1" as NSCoupledTransientNewton1 <<C>>

class "NSCoupledTransientSlip1" as NSCoupledTransientSlip1 <<C>>
class "NSCoupledTransientNewtonSlip1" as NSCoupledTransientNewtonSlip1 <<C>>

StokesCoupledSteady1 --> StokesCoupledSteadySlip1
StokesCoupledSteady1 --> NSCoupledSteady1
StokesCoupledSteady1 --> NSCoupledSteadyNewton1

StokesCoupledSteadySlip1 --> NSCoupledSteadySlip1
StokesCoupledSteadySlip1 --> NSCoupledSteadyNewtonSlip1

NSCoupledSteady1 --> NSCoupledTransient1
NSCoupledSteadyNewton1 --> NSCoupledTransientNewton1

NSCoupledSteadySlip1 --> NSCoupledTransientSlip1
NSCoupledSteadyNewtonSlip1 --> NSCoupledTransientNewtonSlip1

' Layout hints to resemble the original
StokesCoupledSteady1 -[hidden]down- StokesCoupledSteadySlip1
StokesCoupledSteadySlip1 -[hidden]right- NSCoupledSteady1
NSCoupledSteady1 -[hidden]right- NSCoupledSteadyNewton1

NSCoupledSteadySlip1 -[hidden]right- NSCoupledSteadyNewtonSlip1
NSCoupledSteadyNewtonSlip1 -[hidden]right- NSCoupledTransient1
NSCoupledTransient1 -[hidden]right- NSCoupledTransientNewton1

NSCoupledTransientSlip1 -[hidden]right- NSCoupledTransientNewtonSlip1
@enduml
